sections.markdown:
- Legs strength session
- This is the only heavy lower-body lift for the week; keep it away from Tuesday, Thursday, and Sunday hard run days and the Monday/Saturday basketball slots.
- Main strength: squat, trap-bar deadlift, or leg press pattern, `3 to 5 x 3 to 6`.
- Single-leg strength: split squat, step-up, or reverse lunge, `3 x 6 to 8` each side.
- Posterior chain: Romanian deadlift, hip thrust, or hamstring curl, `3 x 6 to 10`.
- Basketball durability: calf raises, tibialis raises, Copenhagen or adductor work, and anti-rotation trunk work, `2 to 3` controlled sets.
- If Tuesday quality or Monday basketball leaves the legs flat, reduce this to light technique work and avoid soreness-chasing accessories.
